text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You want to go outsomewhere... with me?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It would be an honor! By all means—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, pardon me. I have to take this.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this is Hayakawa. Right...<n>Mmhm... Well,
about that...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... There's an urgent matter<n>that I need
to attend to.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um... Would it be okay if I take a rain<n>check?
choice_data_list: I can wait until you're done!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you! You're so kind!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'll get everything<n>wrapped up in a
jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But it'll be dark soon, huh? I'm<n>sorry...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If we head out now, we can't go<n>anywhere too
far away. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna and I rack our brains thinking<n>of where
we can go, when...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Was that you?
choice_data_list: I don't think it was only me...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Yes, you're right! I'm pretty<n>hungry
myself!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I just thought of a good place for us<n>to go!
Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, good! There are seats open!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's recommendation is this<n>rough-looking
ramen shop.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: This is my go-to place!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The ramen is great, of course, but the<n>pan-fried
dumplings are to die for!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's eat a ton today! Since<n>there are two
of us, let's order the<n>jumbo set!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After that, let's stop by the<n>supermarket so I can
grab some milk!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so we spend the rest of the<n>evening eating
delicious food together.
